sourceNotes: Source-backed cleanup 2026-05-29: AllAboutPeloponnisos and PatrasInfo support the Gianniskari area identity, difficult/narrow gravel-road approach, sandy terrain, shallow-water note, and nearby parking. PatrasInfo also supports beach-bar/sunbed services for Gianniskari generally, but Mikro Gianniskari remains unorganized in this record because exact micro-cove amenities are not separately confirmed. No live sea-state claim was added.

sourceNotes: OSM source pass 2026-05-27: same-name natural=beach feature near stored coordinates supports identity/location only. Confidence, access, services, amenities, and scoring were not changed.

Official Achaia bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: the official Aigio - Alykes profile supports identity/location for the Alyki beach area, pebble/rocky shore and seabed, asphalt-road access, deep first meters, partial organization with umbrellas, sunbeds, WC, showers, changing rooms and bins, plus sparse tamarisk vegetation. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, water-quality, or live-condition claim was imported.

amenities: φυσική σκιά σε σημεία από ψηλή βλάστηση

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα αναφέρει βαθιά πρώτα μέτρα, απότομη κλίση πυθμένα και ισοβαθή 5 μ. περίπου στα 25 μ. από την ακτή.

sourceNotes: OSM source pass 2026-05-27: same-name natural=beach feature near stored coordinates supports identity/location only. Confidence, access, services, amenities, and scoring were not changed.

Official Achaia bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: the official Egkali profile supports identity/location, pebble/rocky shore and seabed, asphalt-road access, deep first meters with steep seabed slope, organized southeast section with umbrellas, sunbeds, showers, bins and refreshment facility, plus tall vegetation. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, water-quality, or live-condition claim was imported.
